rule: the InclusiveNamespaces PrefixList forces a listed prefix (b) to be rendered at the top of the output subtree even when not yet visibly utilized there
provenance: derived from W3C Exclusive XML Canonicalization 1.0 REC (xml-exc-c14n-20020718) §3 InclusiveNamespaces PrefixList rule; expected output computed by hand from the spec rule, not from a third-party tool.
